title: DevSwarm / Review-Gate Funnel
description: The core value prop, instrumented: what the critic catches, how often regeneration fixes it, and whether the gate is alive at all. A flatlining catch rate means the critic is broken, not that the code got perfect.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT sum(attributes_number['devswarm.generation.critic_catches']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT sum(attributes_number['devswarm.generation.regenerations']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS ts, sum(attributes_number['devswarm.generation.critic_catches']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['devswarm.generation.id'] AS generation, attributes_string['devswarm.generation.verdict'] AS verdict, attributes_number['devswarm.generation.critic_catches'] AS catches, attributes_number['devswarm.generation.regenerations'] AS regens, round(durationNano/1e9,1) AS seconds FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
